things.name: Taj Mahal Day Trip
things.description: The world's greatest monument to love — a 3-hour drive to Agra for the iconic white marble mausoleum

things.name: Red Fort (Lal Qila)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17th-century Mughal fort where India's PM delivers the Independence Day address

things.name: Qutub Minar
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 73-metre 12th-century brick minaret — India's tallest minaret and a masterpiece of Islamic architecture

things.name: Humayun's Tomb
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage precursor to the Taj Mahal — stunning Mughal garden tomb from 1572

things.name: India Gate & Kartavya Path
things.description: Delhi's iconic war memorial arch on the ceremonial boulevard — evening promenade with food vendors

things.name: Chandni Chowk Old Delhi
things.description: Mughal-era bazaar district — explore by cycle rickshaw through narrow lanes of spice, jewellery and street food

things.name: Lotus Temple
things.description: Stunning Bahai House of Worship shaped like a blooming lotus flower — open to all religions

things.name: National Museum
things.description: India's finest museum with 200,000 artefacts spanning 5,000 years — the Harappan gallery is exceptional

things.name: Jama Masjid
things.description: India's largest mosque (1656) — climb the minaret for views over Old Delhi's rooftops

things.name: Hauz Khas Village
things.description: Medieval reservoir ruins surrounded by Delhi's trendiest cafes, boutiques and art galleries
